art_market.summary: Global art sales grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, signaling a return to growth. U.S. auction sales surged 23% to $3.17 billion in 2025.
key_trends: Global rebound led by public auctions (up 9%) and blue-chip artists.
U.S. remains market leader (44% share), driven by high-end demand and strategic guarantees.
Market sentiment: Dealers focused on local collectors amid rising international logistics/tax costs.

korean_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,781.20 (+0.31%) on March 20, 2026. Positive sentiment prevailed despite net foreign selling.
korean_market.sentiment: Cautious optimism; index supported by individual and pension fund buying, geopolitical hopes.
